steps.title: Convert miles to gallons
steps.content:
The car travels $32$ miles per gallon, so after $d$ miles, the amount of gas used is
$$\frac{d}{32}$$
gallons.

steps.title: Subtract from the initial gas
steps.content:
The tank starts with $12$ gallons. The remaining amount is the starting amount minus the amount used.
$$f(d)=12-\frac{d}{32}$$
The answer is C.
